title: jasminum newtonii
intro: Jasminum newtonii is a flowering plant species in the family Oleaceae, commonly known as the Newton's Jasmine or the White Jasmine. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Jasminum newtonii include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders such as diarrhea and dysentery. The plant's leaves and flowers are used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
